description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6 Docker image. Define a single job named pages in the test stage that runs `pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt` followed by `FLASK_APP=app.py flask freeze`, publishes the resulting `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only executes when the commit ref name equals the default branch, deploying the site to GitLab Pages.
